    │   │   │   @ 0x1da434b76eba4736d6e760bfd78cbf883a0776ee1666a9157f99ab1b97923a3c: 0x0000000000000000000000000000000000000000000000004cf7b30cad54762c → 0x00000000000000000000000000000000000000000000000023558ef1b728762c
    │   │   │   @ 0x9ddf8259b5dfabc9e47e107236a6121103d753bff80b7accad156017de069d9a: 0x00000000000000000000000000000000000000000000031fcf689ab17916cd10 → 0x00000000000000000000000000000000000000000000031ff90abecc6f42cd10
    │   │   └─ ← [Return] true
    │   └─ ← [Return]
    ├─ [1264] WETH9::symbol() [staticcall]
    │   └─ ← [Return] "WETH"
    ├─ [534] WETH9::balanceOf(GradientPool: [0x7FA9385bE102ac3EAc297483Dd6233D62b3e1496]) [staticcall]
    │   └─ ← [Return] 2546098333159028268 [2.546e18]
    ├─ [444] WETH9::decimals() [staticcall]
    │   └─ ← [Return] 18
    ├─ emit log_named_decimal_uint(key: "Attacker After exploit WETH Balance", val: 2546098333159028268 [2.546e18], decimals: 18)
    └─ ← [Stop]

Suite result: ok. 1 passed; 0 failed; 0 skipped; finished in 12.55s (11.23s CPU time)
